brand.title: Brand
brand.description: The SITE the chat is on. ALWAYS pass @variables.brand ('Kwitko Coffee' or 'Bean & Brew') so the cart link goes to the correct storefront (Kwitko=WooCommerce; Bean & Brew=the D2C store). Never omit it.

couponCode.title: Coupon Code
couponCode.description: Optional discount coupon code to apply.

productIdsCsv.title: Product Ids CSV
productIdsCsv.description: Comma-separated Salesforce product ids to add — use primaryProductId and complementaryProductId from the recommendation.

verifiedEmail.title: Verified Email
verifiedEmail.description: ALWAYS pass @variables.loggedInEmail (the signed-in shopper's verified email). Bean & Brew (the D2C store) uses it to confirm the shopper is a registered buyer of this store; if it is empty or not a registered buyer the action returns success=false with a not-registered message. Never omit it.
